meta.summary: Public genealogy, cemetery, and newspaper resources verified against the Wixted family workbook.

categories.label: Cemetery & Burial Records
categories.description: Official burial indexes and memorial databases matching names in the family workbook.

categories.label: Obituaries & Newspapers
categories.description: Published death notices and funeral home records for Wixted family members.

categories.label: Genealogy Databases
categories.description: Collaborative trees, census records, and surname research for Wixted/Wicksted lines.

categories.label: Historical Context
categories.description: Railroad, colonial, and regional history connected to family notes.

categories.label: Irish & English Origins
categories.description: Research on the Lambeth/London and Tipperary/Limerick Wixted roots.

resources.title: Find a Grave — Wixted in New York
resources.desc: 509 memorial records for Wixted in NY, including Holy Sepulchre (Rochester), St Mary's (Corning), and Mechanicville.

resources.title: Mount Hope Cemetery Burial Search
resources.desc: University of Rochester index of 360,000+ burials at Mt Hope & Riverside — many Wixted workbook references point here.

resources.title: Steuben County Historian — Obituary Index (W)
resources.desc: Official county obituary index listing Wixted burials: John L (1993), Hazel M (1984), Margaret C (1984), Raymond J (1973), Vincent D (1977), Thomas A (1967).

resources.title: Holy Sepulchre Cemetery — Rochester Wixteds
resources.desc: Find a Grave memorials include Alice Wixted (1886–1918), Anna Wixted (1903–1907), Sr Adrian Wixted (1887–1964) at Holy Sepulchre, Rochester.

resources.title: Friends of Mount Hope — Free Lookups
resources.desc: Volunteer genealogical lookup service for Mount Hope Cemetery, Rochester. 10–14 day response.

resources.title: Kolleen N. Wixted Obituary (2017)
resources.desc: Full obituary — daughter of Rod & Karyl Wixted, sister Maura White, nieces Hannah & Molly White. Honeoye/Livonia, NY.

resources.title: Dougherty Funeral Home — Kolleen Wixted
resources.desc: Condolences and memorial page for Kolleen N. Wixted, Oct 23, 2017.

resources.title: Democrat and Chronicle — Rochester Archives
resources.desc: Historical Rochester newspaper archive. Wixted family census and death notices appear throughout the 1900s.

resources.title: WikiTree — Wixted Surname
resources.desc: Free collaborative tree with 100+ Wixted profiles including Tipperary, Limerick, and Ireland-to-America migrations.

resources.title: Thomas Wickstead & Mary Hogan Descendants
resources.desc: Research query matching workbook patriarch Thomas James Wixted (1796–1873) and Mary Hogan — children Henry b1826, Margaret b1838, James b1839.

resources.title: FamilySearch — Wixted Records
resources.desc: Free LDS genealogy archive with census, immigration, and vital records for Wixted/Wicksted families.

resources.title: Ancestry — Wixted Family History
resources.desc: 2,000+ census records, 429 military records. 24% of US Wixteds were in New York in 1880.

resources.title: Erie Railroad Employee Photo Index
resources.desc: Historical photos of Erie RR workers — relevant to John McGraw (Avon trackwalker) and Wixted railroad workers in Corning.

resources.title: Erie Railroad Magazine Master Index
resources.desc: Employee names, obituaries, and service records from Erie Railroad Magazine archives.

resources.title: Mayflower Society — Alden Line
resources.desc: Colonial descent research for the Mayflower branch (John Alden line) in the Gilbert workbook.

resources.title: Ireland Blacksmiths — Wixted, Tipperary
resources.desc: Thomas Wixted, blacksmith of Port Ryan/Newport, Co. Tipperary (1800s). Family trade passed to sons James and John.

resources.title: Mount Saint Lawrence Cemetery — Limerick Wixteds
resources.desc: Irish burial records for Wixted family in Limerick City, including William, Josephine, and John Wixted.

resources.title: Wixted Surname — Irish Origins
resources.desc: Surname established in Ireland since the 17th century, primarily County Tipperary. English habitational root from Wickstead/Wixted.

wixted-73-27.label: Steuben Co. Obituary — John L Wixted (1993)

wixted-73-29.label: Steuben Co. Obituary — Hazel M Wixted (1984)

wixted-73-59.label: Steuben Co. — Raymond J Wixted, St Mary's Corning

wixted-30-23.label: Erie Railroad Employee Photos — Avon area
